languages.text: {n}Разведывательный шаттл быстро спускается к пирамиде. По вокс-каналу группа сообщает, что никаких признаков жизни рядом с ней не обнаружено. Загадочная постройка состоит из цельного камня, и в ней отсутствует даже намек на наличие дверей или окон. Рядом с ней разведчики находят следы имперского лагеря.{/n}

{n}The scouting shuttle rapidly descends toward the pyramid. The team reports via vox-channel that no signs of life have been found near it. The mysterious structure is made of solid stone and shows no hint of any doors or windows. Nearby, the scouts find evidence of an Imperial camp.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Разведывательный шаттл быстро спускается к пирамиде. По вокс-каналу группа сообщает, что никаких признаков жизни рядом с ней не обнаружено. Загадочная постройка состоит из цельного камня, и в ней отсутствует даже намек на наличие дверей или окон. Рядом с ней разведчики находят следы имперского лагеря.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The scouting shuttle rapidly descends toward the pyramid. The team reports via vox-channel that no signs of life have been found near it. The mysterious structure is made of solid stone and shows no hint of any doors or windows. Nearby, the scouts find evidence of an Imperium camp.{/n}

{n}The scouting shuttle rapidly descends toward the pyramid. The team reports via vox-channel that no signs of life have been found near it. The mysterious structure is made of solid stone and shows no hint of any doors or windows. Nearby, the scouts find evidence of an Imperium camp.{/n}

{n}The scouting shuttle rapidly descends toward the pyramid. The team reports via vox-channel that no signs of life have been found near it. The mysterious structure is made of solid stone and shows no hint of any doors or windows. Nearby, the scouts find evidence of an Imperium camp.{/n}

languages.text: {n}偵察シャトルがピラミッドに向かって急降下する。チームはボイスチャネルで報告した。ピラミッド周辺では生命の兆候は見つからなかった。謎の構造物は堅い石でできており、ドアや窓の痕跡は見られない。近くで偵察隊は帝国軍のキャンプ跡を発見した。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The scouting shuttle rapidly descends toward the pyramid. The team reports via vox-channel that no signs of life have been found near it. The mysterious structure is made of solid stone and shows no hint of any doors or windows. Nearby, the scouts find evidence of an Imperium camp.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}偵察シャトルがピラミッドに向かって急降下する。チームはボイスチャネルで報告した。ピラミッド周辺では生命の兆候は見つからなかった。謎の構造物は堅い石でできており、ドアや窓の痕跡は見られない。近くで偵察隊は帝国軍のキャンプ跡を発見した。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La lanzadera de exploración desciende rápidamente a la pirámide. El equipo informa por voco que no hay señales de vida en las inmediaciones. La misteriosa estructura está hecha de roca sólida y no tiene ni puertas ni ventanas de ningún tipo. Los exploradores han encontrado los restos de un campamento Imperial en la zona.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The scouting shuttle rapidly descends toward the pyramid. The team reports via vox-channel that no signs of life have been found near it. The mysterious structure is made of solid stone and shows no hint of any doors or windows. Nearby, the scouts find evidence of an Imperial camp.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La lanzadera de exploración desciende rápidamente a la pirámide. El equipo informa por voco que no hay señales de vida en las inmediaciones. La misteriosa estructura está hecha de roca sólida y no tiene ni puertas ni ventanas de ningún tipo. Los exploradores han encontrado los restos de un campamento Imperial en la zona.{/n}

languages.text: {n}侦察穿梭机急速降落在金字塔旁。小队通过音阵频道报告，附近未侦测到任何生命迹象。这座神秘建筑由实心石材构成，全无门窗痕迹。在附近，侦察队发现了帝国营地遗留的痕迹。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The scouting shuttle rapidly descends toward the pyramid. The team reports via vox-channel that no signs of life have been found near it. The mysterious structure is made of solid stone and shows no hint of any doors or windows. Nearby, the scouts find evidence of an Imperial camp.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}侦察穿梭机急速降落在金字塔旁。小队通过音阵频道报告，附近未侦测到任何生命迹象。这座神秘建筑由实心石材构成，全无门窗痕迹。在附近，侦察队发现了帝国营地遗留的痕迹。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das Erkundungsshuttle macht sich auf den Weg zur Pyramide. Das Team meldet, dass in ihrer Umgebung keinerlei Lebenszeichen gefunden wurde. Die geheimnisvolle Struktur besteht aus massivem Stein und hat keinerlei Türen oder Fenster. Nicht weit entfernt entdecken die Späher Hinweise auf ein imperiales Lager.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The scouting shuttle rapidly descends toward the pyramid. The team reports via vox-channel that no signs of life have been found near it. The mysterious structure is made of solid stone and shows no hint of any doors or windows. Nearby, the scouts find evidence of an Imperial camp.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Das Erkundungsshuttle macht sich auf den Weg zur Pyramide. Das Team meldet, dass in ihrer Umgebung keinerlei Lebenszeichen gefunden wurde. Die geheimnisvolle Struktur besteht aus massivem Stein und hat keinerlei Türen oder Fenster. Nicht weit entfernt entdecken die Späher Hinweise auf ein imperiales Lager.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Keşif mekiği, hızla piramide doğru alçalıyor. Ekip, voks kanalı aracılığıyla yakınlarda hiçbir yaşam belirtisi bulunmadığını bildiriyor. Gizemli yapı, som taştan yapılmış ve herhangi bir kapı veya pencereye dair hiçbir iz göstermiyor. Gözcüler, yakınlarda bir İmparatorluk kampına dair kanıt buluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The scouting shuttle rapidly descends toward the pyramid. The team reports via vox-channel that no signs of life have been found near it. The mysterious structure is made of solid stone and shows no hint of any doors or windows. Nearby, the scouts find evidence of an Imperial camp.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Keşif mekiği, hızla piramide doğru alçalıyor. Ekip, voks kanalı aracılığıyla yakınlarda hiçbir yaşam belirtisi bulunmadığını bildiriyor. Gizemli yapı, som taştan yapılmış ve herhangi bir kapı veya pencereye dair hiçbir iz göstermiyor. Gözcüler, yakınlarda bir İmparatorluk kampına dair kanıt buluyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La navette de reconnaissance descend rapidement vers la pyramide. L'équipage signale via le canal-vox qu'aucun signe de vie n'est détecté à proximité et que la mystérieuse structure, dépourvue de portes ou de fenêtres, semble composée intégralement de pierre solide. Les éclaireurs découvrent non loin les traces d'un campement impérial.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The scouting shuttle rapidly descends toward the pyramid. The team reports via vox-channel that no signs of life have been found near it. The mysterious structure is made of solid stone and shows no hint of any doors or windows. Nearby, the scouts find evidence of an Imperial camp.{/n}
